Irreparable Personal Injuries are either 1. Irre= 
Mutilation.
Under Disfigurement is comprised Discolourment.
Irreparable Disfigurement is where in the shape or colour 
of a man's person any unalterable change is produced 
the effect of which is to render his aspect less agreeable.

or incompleat:  it is compleat where a man is deprived
of the use of a member altogether: incompleat when he
is deprived of the use of it in part.
